info.name: EasyBons - Merchant Coupons System (Final)
info.description: Complete merchant coupon system with clear role indicators and parameter requirements

item.name: Add Points to User (OWNER/COOPERATOR) - requires userId
Get Own Point Balance (OWNER/COOPERATOR) - auto merchant
Get Own Point Transactions (OWNER/COOPERATOR) - auto merchant
Get My Created Coupons (OWNER/COOPERATOR) - auto merchant
Get All Available Coupons (ANY ROLE) - no params
Get Coupons by Merchant (ANY ROLE) - requires merchantId
Get My Claimed Coupons (CLIENT) - no params
Get Coupon Usage History (CLIENT) - no params
Activate Own Stamp Card (OWNER/COOPERATOR) - auto merchant
